title: Dialog Button Item
description: Interface defining the properties of a button item within a dialog. This interface allows customization of button appearance, behavior, and interaction handling.

props.name: text
props.description: The text label displayed on the button.

props.name: color
props.description: The color theme of the button (primary, success, warning, danger, etc.).

props.name: look
props.description: The visual appearance style of the button (solid, outline, twotone, etc.).

props.name: name
props.description: Optional name identifier for the button, used for identification when clicked.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Whether the button is disabled and cannot be clicked.

props.name: loading
props.description: Whether the button is in a loading state, typically showing a spinner.

props.name: hotkey
props.description: Keyboard shortcut or hotkey action that triggers the button click.

props.name: autofocus
props.description: Whether the button should automatically receive focus when the dialog opens.

props.name: onClick
props.description: Callback function executed when the button is clicked. The event object contains the button source and a handled flag.
